    UserNameRecognizer - Class in userNameRecognizerTestbed
    Result attributes to be used for GUI applications where a detailed error message and a pointer to the character of the error will enhance the user experience.
    UserNameRecognizer() - Constructor for class userNameRecognizerTestbed.UserNameRecognizer
    Constructor for UserNameRecognizer.
    userNameRecognizerErrorMessage - Static variable in class userNameRecognizerTestbed.UserNameRecognizer
    The error message text

    The index of error location

    The input being processed
